item.title: Nike W NSW tee ESSNTL Icon Futura Camiseta de Manga Corta Mujer Blanco White/Black XS
item.description: Tienes Nike W NSW tee ESSNTL Icon Futura Camiseta de Manga Corta Mujer Blanco White/Black XS aqui! 🔎: Classic fit Soft fabric Swoosh logo on the front 🛒 Comprar!!!
